hooks.command: osascript -e 'display notification "Claude Code is waiting for your input" with title "Claude Code" sound name "Ping"'
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude Code needs permission" with title "Claude Code" sound name "Ping"'

echo '--- Git Status ---' && git status --short && echo '' && echo '--- Unpushed Commits ---' && (git log --oneline @{u}..HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo 'No upstream set') && echo '' && echo '--- Pending Tasks ---' && (grep '^- \[ \]' .claude/tasks/TASKS.md 2>/dev/null || echo 'No pending tasks')
